error_signature: AI Agent node doesn’t support audio as input
title: AI Agent does not support audio input
symptom: When using the AI Agent node with audio input, it returns empty JSON or random values. This indicates that the audio is not being processed correctly.
not_this_if: Using transcription nodes before AI Agent
root_cause: The AI Agent node is designed to work with text inputs and does not support audio binaries. As a result, any audio input provided is ignored, leading to empty or nonsensical outputs.
fix_steps: Use a custom HTTP Request node to call your LiteLLM STT endpoint with the audio binary.
Receive the transcribed text from the STT endpoint.
Pass the resulting text to the AI Agent node for structured data extraction.
agent_instruction: Implement a custom HTTP Request to handle speech-to-text conversion before passing the text to the AI Agent.
